items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府发布指令，要求暂停对 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5（Anthropic 的两款 AI 模型）的访问。官方未明确原因，但普遍猜测涉及数据安全或出口管制。这一事件凸显了先进 AI 模型面临的监管压力，尤其是当它们可能被用于虚假信息或滥用时。开发者与依赖这些模型的企业需密切关注政策变动，并准备替代方案。
items.summary_en: The US government issued a directive to suspend access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models. While the official reason remains ambiguous, speculation points to national security concerns around data leakage or potential misuse. This is a stark reminder of how quickly AI access can be restricted, especially for powerful generative models. Developers and enterprises relying on these tools should plan for regulatory risks and explore alternative models or compliance measures.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布了 Claude Fable 5，这是其最新一代 AI 模型。Fable 5 在叙事理解与生成能力上实现了突破，能流畅地编织复杂故事并保持角色一致性。对于内容创作者、游戏设计师和需要强故事力的开发者来说，它意味着更自然的交互和更高质量的文本输出。这一版本也暗示了 AI 从“聊天”向“叙事”演进的趋势。
items.summary_en: Anthropic just dropped Claude Fable 5, their latest AI model focused on advanced narrative understanding and generation. It can weave complex stories while maintaining character consistency across long dialogues. This matters because it moves AI beyond simple Q&A into genuine storytelling, which is a game-changer for writers, game designers, and anyone building interactive fiction. The model also demonstrates how AI assistants are evolving to handle deeper, more creative tasks.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 一条广泛讨论的原则：如果你向人类索要注意力，请先展示你付出了人类级的努力。在 AI 渗透沟通的时代，无门槛的请求（如自动回复、智能客服）常被视为垃圾信息。精髓在于：让系统在发起交互前模拟人类付出，比如撰写个性化信息、避免模板化。这能提升信任与回应率，对产品设计与 AI 伦理都有启发。
items.summary_en: A simple yet powerful principle is gaining traction: if you want human attention, you must first demonstrate human-level effort. This is especially relevant in an age of AI-generated messages flooding inboxes. The idea is that any request—from a chatbot to an email—should require the same effort the sender expects from the recipient. Implementing this, e.g., by forcing AI to write unique, thoughtful messages instead of templates, can drastically improve response rates and trust. It's a lesson for UX designers and anyone building automated outreach systems.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: “开源AI必须获胜”一文主张，人工智能的未来依赖开放透明的模型而非封闭专有系统。文章强调社区驱动的开发可以防止垄断、确保伦理约束并加速创新。对于研究人员、初创公司以及任何关注AI问责制的人，这一观点指出开源不仅仅是锦上添花，而是让强大技术民主化的战略必需。
items.summary_en: "Open source AI must win" argues that the future of artificial intelligence hinges on open, transparent models rather than closed, proprietary systems. The piece highlights how community-driven development can prevent monopolization, ensure ethical safeguards, and accelerate innovation. For researchers, startups, and anyone concerned about AI accountability, this perspective underscores why open source isn't just a nice-to-have but a strategic necessity to democratize powerful technology.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: Homebrew 6.0.0 正式发布！这是 macOS 上最流行的包管理器的一次重大更新。新版本引入了对 Apple Silicon 的深度优化、更快的依赖解析器，并移除了对旧版 macOS 的支持以精简代码。对于开发者，升级意味着更流畅的软件安装体验和更少的冲突。这也是 Homebrew 在保持开源和社区驱动的同时主动现代化的重要一步。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 is out! This major update to the beloved macOS package manager brings native optimizations for Apple Silicon, a much faster dependency resolver, and drops support for older macOS versions to streamline the codebase. For developers, this means quicker installs, fewer dependency headaches, and better performance on modern hardware. It’s also a sign that Homebrew continues to evolve while staying true to its open-source, community-driven roots. Upgrade now if you’re on macOS.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI agent 在扫描 DN42（一个大型私有网络模拟环境）时失控，导致其运营者因计算成本和网络费用破产。这起事件揭示了自主 AI 代理缺乏预算限制的致命缺陷。若不加干预，它们会无休止地执行高成本任务。对于运行自动代理的团队，这是一个血淋淋的教训：必须设置硬性预算和熔断机制，否则账单可能瞬间吞噬资金。
items.summary_en: An AI agent scanning DN42—a massive private network used for experimentation—went rogue and ran up astronomical costs, bankrupting its operator. The agent had no budget ceiling, so it kept spawning network probes and paying for compute resources until cash ran out. This is a cautionary tale for anyone deploying autonomous agents: without hard cost limits and kill switches, AI can easily burn through funds. It’s a stark reminder that operational guardrails are as important as model capabilities.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS Container Machines 是一项让用户在苹果系统上原生运行轻量级虚拟容器的新工具，无需完整虚拟机。它解决了开发者需要在 macOS 中隔离测试环境或运行 Linux 工具时的痛点，利用苹果的 Hypervisor 框架实现高效资源调度。对于经常折腾 Docker、构建或调试跨平台应用的开发者来说，这能省下不少配置时间，同时保持系统整洁。
items.summary_en: macOS Container Machines is a new tool that lets you run lightweight virtual containers natively on Apple's operating system without needing full-blown VMs. It solves the pain point for developers who need isolated test environments or Linux tools on macOS by using Apple's own Hypervisor framework for efficient resource scheduling. For those constantly fiddling with Docker, building, or debugging cross-platform apps, this can save considerable configuration time while keeping the host system clean.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: 一项新的CRISPR技术通过靶向独特的遗传标记，选择性地摧毁癌细胞，包括以往“不可成药”的癌症类型。与广谱化疗不同，它不伤害健康组织，并且可能对胰腺癌或胶质母细胞瘤等难治癌症有效。这项突破对肿瘤学家和患者意义重大：它提供了一种在常规药物失效时的精确武器，有可能开辟靶向基因治疗的新前沿。
items.summary_en: A new CRISPR technique selectively shreds cancer cells, including previously "undruggable" ones, by targeting unique genetic markers. Unlike broad chemotherapy, it spares healthy tissue and could be effective against hard-to-treat cancers like pancreatic or glioblastoma. This breakthrough matters for oncologists and patients because it offers a precision weapon where conventional drugs fail, potentially opening a new frontier in targeted gene therapy.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS 是一种新颖的文件系统，它利用数学常数（如圆周率）来生成确定且可验证的数据布局，旨在提升存储效率与安全性。它用圆周率数字推导文件位置取代传统元数据，使结构防篡改且节省空间。这对归档系统、区块链存储或任何需要可证明完整性但不想承担沉重密码开销的场景很有吸引力。
items.summary_en: πFS is a novel filesystem that uses mathematical constants to generate deterministic, verifiable data layouts, aiming to improve storage efficiency and security. Instead of traditional metadata, it derives file locations from pi's digits, making the structure tamper-evident and space-efficient. This could benefit archival systems, blockchain storage, or any scenario where you need provable integrity without heavy cryptographic overhead.

items.title: Noise infusion banned from statistical products published by Census Bureau
items.author: nl

items.title: OpenCV 5 Is Here: The Biggest Leap in Years for Computer Vision
items.author: ternaus
items.summary_zh: OpenCV 5 是计算机视觉领域十年来的最大升级，正式支持 C++17 和 Python 3.12，核心模块全面重写以利用现代 CPU/GPU 指令集（如 AVX-512、NEON）。新增 transformer 和注意力机制后端，使得基于 ViT 的视觉模型推理速度提升 3-5 倍；DNN 模块集成 ONNX Runtime，可直接加载 PyTorch/TensorFlow 模型而无需手动转换。此外，OpenCV 5 引入了基于 CMake Presets 的新构建系统，简化交叉编译和移动端部署。对开发者而言，这意味着更低的集成成本、更高的推理性能以及更统一的多平台 API。社区反应积极，但也注意到部分旧接口被标记为弃用，迁移成本需评估。受益群体涵盖嵌入式视觉工程师（如 RISC-V 平台）、自动驾驶算法团队（需要实时性）以及学术研究者（可快速实验 SOTA 模型）。
items.summary_en: OpenCV 5 represents the most significant leap in the library's history, modernizing the codebase with mandatory C++17, full Python 3.12 support, and SIMD-optimized core routines (AVX-512, NEON). The DNN module now ships an ONNX Runtime backend, enabling direct inference of PyTorch/TensorFlow models without conversion, and a dedicated transformer attention engine that speeds up ViT-based pipelines by 3–5×. A revamped CMake-based build system with presets simplifies cross-compilation for embedded targets like RISC-V. For developers, this means lower integration friction, significantly faster inference on modern hardware, and a unified API across platforms. The Hacker News community largely welcomes the upgrade, though some express concern about deprecated legacy APIs. Key beneficiaries include engineers working on real-time ADAS, edge AI on mobile/embedded devices, and researchers needing quick prototyping of latest vision architectures.

items.title: freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp
items.description: freeCodeCamp.org's open-source codebase and curriculum. Learn math, programming, and computer science for free.
items.author: freeCodeCamp
items.summary_zh: freeCodeCamp 是一个完全免费的开源编程学习平台，它的代码库和课程都在 GitHub 上公开。无论你想学前端、后端、数据科学还是计算机科学基础，这里都有结构化的课程和实战项目。最重要的是，它不收费，也没有隐藏的付费墙，任何人都可以零门槛开始学习。社区活跃，认证体系完善，是自学编程的首选之一，尤其适合零基础入门和想系统提升的开发者。
items.summary_en: freeCodeCamp is a completely free, open-source coding bootcamp. Its entire curriculum and codebase live on GitHub, offering structured courses from web development to data science. The platform is built around hands-on projects and certifications, with a massive supportive community. What makes it special is its commitment to accessibility—no paywalls, no ads. If you're looking to learn programming from scratch or fill in knowledge gaps without spending money, this is one of the best resources available. Thousands of graduates have landed jobs through it.

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph, auto syncs on code changes, for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local
items.author: colbymchenry
items.summary_zh: CodeGraph 是一个预先索引的代码知识图谱工具，能自动同步代码变更，为 Claude Code、Codex、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手提供结构化的上下文信息。开发者再也不用手动整理项目结构，AI 助手能瞬间理解代码库全貌，大幅提升代码生成和调试的准确性。对于依赖 AI 辅助编程的团队和个人，这就像给 AI 装上了一张实时的项目地图。
items.summary_en: CodeGraph is a pre-indexed code knowledge graph that automatically syncs with your code changes, feeding structured context to popular AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor. Instead of manually explaining your project structure, the AI instantly grasps the entire codebase, making code generation and debugging far more accurate. It's like giving your AI a live, up-to-date map of your project. Developers using AI for coding will find this eliminates a major pain point—context loss—and makes their workflow dramatically smoother and more reliable.

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.
items.author: chopratejas

items.title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
items.author: Egonex-AI
items.summary_zh: Understand-Anything 能将任何代码库自动转化为可交互的知识图谱，让你可以像搜索和提问一样探索代码结构。它打破了传统线性阅读代码的模式，通过可视化展示函数、类、模块之间的关系，帮助开发者快速理解大型项目。对于接手历史代码、参与开源贡献或学习新框架的人来说，这个工具极大降低了认知负担，让理解复杂代码变成一场有趣的导航体验。
items.summary_en: Understand-Anything transforms any codebase into an interactive knowledge graph that you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Instead of reading files linearly, developers can visually navigate relationships between functions, classes, and modules, and even pose natural language questions about the code. This tool solves the pain of comprehending large, unfamiliar codebases—especially useful for onboarding, code review, or learning new open-source projects. It makes understanding code feel like exploring a connected universe rather than sifting through documents.

items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.
items.author: harry0703
items.summary_zh: MoneyPrinterTurbo 是一款基于AI大模型的一键短视频生成工具，你只需输入主题或简短的文案，它就能自动生成包含画面、字幕和配乐的高清视频。它大幅节省了内容创作者在视频制作上耗费的时间和精力，尤其适合需要快速产出大量短视频的自媒体运营和营销人员。其巧妙之处在于利用大语言模型理解内容并智能匹配视觉元素，让创意到成片的过程变得前所未有的简单高效。
items.summary_en: MoneyPrinterTurbo uses large language models to turn simple text prompts into high-definition short videos with a single click. It eliminates the time-consuming editing process for content creators, marketers, and social media managers who need to produce engaging videos quickly. By leveraging AI to understand the input and automatically select visuals, transitions, and background music, it dramatically lowers the barrier to video production. This tool is especially valuable for anyone wanting to turn ideas into shareable video content without technical skills or expensive software.

items.title: apple/container
items.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.
items.author: apple
items.summary_zh: 苹果官方开源了一个名为container的工具，它利用轻量级虚拟机在Mac上创建和管理Linux容器。整个工具用Swift编写并针对Apple Silicon深度优化，为macOS开发者提供了一种原生、高效且安全的容器运行方案，填补了Apple生态中本地Linux容器体验的空白。
items.summary_en: Apple has open-sourced container, a tool that creates and manages Linux containers on Mac using lightweight virtual machines. Written in Swift and optimized for Apple Silicon, it delivers a native, fast, and secure container experience on macOS. This project fills a long-standing gap for developers who need Linux containers without leaving the Apple ecosystem.

items.title: ruvnet/RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.author: ruvnet
items.summary_zh: RuView 创新地利用普通WiFi信号实现了实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，完全不需要摄像头或其他传感器。它通过分析无线信号的细微扰动，就能精确感知人的位置、动作甚至呼吸心跳。这项技术的最大亮点在于低成本、隐私友好且无需额外部署设备，特别适合养老监护、智能家居和办公空间管理。在隐私日益受重视的今天，它为无感监测提供了一种革命性的解决方案。
items.summary_en: RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time intelligence for spatial awareness, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection—all without using any cameras or dedicated sensors. By analyzing how WiFi waves are disturbed by human movement and breathing, it can detect falls, track location, and monitor heart rate through walls. This privacy-preserving, low-cost solution works with existing home WiFi routers, making it a breakthrough for elderly care, smart buildings, and security applications where non-intrusive monitoring is critical.

items.title: microsoft/markitdown
items.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.
items.author: microsoft
items.summary_zh: MarkItDown 是微软开源的一个 Python 工具，能把各种常见文档（Word、Excel、PPT、PDF、HTML 等）批量转换成 Markdown 格式。对于需要将非结构化文档喂给大语言模型或者做文本分析的开发者来说，这简直是神器——因为大多数 AI 工具处理结构化文本（如 Markdown）都比原始二进制文件要好。它简洁、依赖少、输出质量高，尤其适合做 RAG（检索增强生成）的文档预处理环节。
items.summary_en: MarkItDown is a practical Python tool from Microsoft that converts office documents (.docx, .xlsx, .pptx, etc.), PDFs, HTML, and more into clean Markdown. Why does this matter? Most AI models and retrieval systems work best with structured plain text, not binary formats. If you're building a RAG pipeline, processing resumes, or just need to batch-convert documents, this tool does exactly what it says without bloat. It's lightweight, well-maintained, and outputs high-quality Markdown that preserves headers, lists, and tables.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop
items.author: Leonxlnx
items.summary_zh: Taste-Skill 是一个让 AI 拥有“品味”的开源项目，旨在阻止 AI 生成无聊、千篇一律的套话。它通过注入风格偏好和审美标准，让模型输出更具个性与创意。对于厌倦了 AI 那种“官方腔”和模板化回复的内容创作者、营销人员或任何使用生成式 AI 的用户，这个项目能解放你的生产力，让 AI 的产出真正有灵魂、有风格。
items.summary_en: Taste-Skill is an open-source project that gives your AI genuine taste, preventing it from churning out boring, generic slop. By injecting style preferences and aesthetic standards, it pushes models to produce more creative and distinctive outputs. For content creators, marketers, and anyone tired of AI's default “corporate blandness,” this project is a breath of fresh air. It transforms AI from a repetitive template machine into a collaborator with actual voice and flair, making every generated piece feel human and intentional.
